item.title: A message from Mme. Perron:
item.description: Last chance to place Charcuterie Board orders for the Europe Team fundraiser in time for Easter Weekend. All orders are due in by Friday, March 6th and boards can be picked up on Holy Thursday in the atrium.

item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: Beavertail Day is Coming to STA! Starting today, Mme Bourdon will be selling tickets for a delicious treat you won’t want to miss! On Tuesday, March 10th, the Bytown Beavertails mobile truck will be rolling into STA during both lunch periods to serve up warm, sweet goodness! Classic Beavertails are $10 each, made fresh and served at lunch. Mme Bourdon will visit each Grade 7/8 class in the morning to collect orders. High School students can grab their tickets during their lunch hour. Tickets are on sale today until Friday. Don’t miss your chance to enjoy this tasty winter treat

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: We are offering the sacrament of confession for students and staff tomorrow. Grade 7/8 teachers - please check the schedule sent by Mr. Vonesch. Confessions will be open to high school students during period 3 tomorrow. If you have any questions, don't hesitate to see Mr. Vonesch. Thank you!

item.title: A message from Mrs. Kwok:
item.description: A reminder to all grade 10 Civics students who signed up to do their speech today, to report to room 127 at the start of lunch.
